laravel-boost.description: Laravel Boost — gives Claude access to DB schema, routes, artisan commands, and Laravel docs for your exact installed version. Install with: composer require laravel/boost --dev && php artisan boost:install

github.description: GitHub MCP — lets Claude manage repos, create PRs, push branches, and handle issues. Replace the token above with a Personal Access Token from github.com/settings/tokens (needs repo + workflow scopes)

context7.description: Context7 — provides Claude with current documentation for Laravel, PHP, Livewire, Filament, Inertia, and other packages. Prevents Claude from using outdated APIs or patterns from its training data.

filesystem.description: Filesystem access scoped to this Laravel project folder
